name: Super Quantal Alphancall Appeal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>要</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>請</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アルファンコール
desc: If a "Super Quant" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Special Summon 1 "Super Quantal Mech Beast" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, then you can Special Summon 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, that is specifically listed on that Xyz Monster in its text, but negate its effects. You can only activate 1 "Super Quantal Alphancall Appeal" per turn.
eff: If a "Super Quant" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Special Summon 1 "Super Quantal Mech Beast" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, then you can Special Summon 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, that is specifically listed on that Xyz Monster in its text, but negate its effects. You can only activate 1 "Super Quantal Alphancall Appeal" per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
